home.subtitle: With years of experience, we specialize in providing robust high-pressure hoses, ideal for heavy industry applications. Our products guarantee safety and efficiency across various sectors, such as naval and steel industries.
home.titleMapa: With a presence throughout Latin America, Mamuth combines experience, excellence, and technical expertise to deliver robust, safe, and high-performance solutions for highly complex industrial operations.
home.descriptionMapa: We operate across various industrial segments, offering high and ultra-high pressure water jetting solutions for applications that demand efficiency, safety, and high operational performance.
home.textoSucro: with applications in the cleaning of evaporators, boilers, heaters, syrup lines, and piping in general.
home.offshore: Oil & Gas sector, offshore and onshore
home.textoOffshore: with solutions for industrial maintenance, technical cleaning, and surface preparation in high-demand environments.
home.textoNaval: with applications in hull cleaning, fouling removal, structural maintenance, and surface preparation.
home.textoConstrucao: utilizing water jetting for concrete cleaning, surface preparation, scabbling, and hydrodemolition.
home.textoPetroquimica: with applications in heat exchangers, tanks, piping, vessels, and boilers.
home.textoPapel: with solutions for the technical cleaning of equipment, ducts, piping, and critical industrial structures.
home.textoMineracao: with applications in heavy-duty cleaning, material cutting, and maintenance of high-demand operational areas.
home.textoEnergia: operating in ducts, cyclone towers, refractories, furnaces, and other complex industrial systems.
home.subtitleProdutos: High-quality equipment for all your industrial needs.
home.subtitleExcelencia1: Mamuth is a national leader in high-pressure equipment and industrial cleaning solutions. With over two decades of experience, we offer products and services that combine cutting-edge technology, operational efficiency, and specialized technical support.
home.subtitleExcelencia2: Our mission is to provide complete solutions that increase productivity and reduce our clients' operational costs, always with a commitment to quality, safety, and sustainability.
home.subtitleEscolher: Technical specialization, complete SAP and UHP portfolio, and support that keeps pace with your operations.
home.subtitlePortifolio: Mamuth operates with a comprehensive portfolio of SAP (high pressure) and UHP (ultra-high pressure) solutions, serving industrial operations that demand performance, safety, and reliability.
home.texto1Portifolio: Equipment, components, and accessories for various pressure regimes.
home.texto2Portifolio: Solutions applicable to industrial, offshore, naval, and infrastructure environments.
home.texto3Portifolio: Configurations aligned with the real demand of each operation.
home.texto4Portifolio: Focus on operational efficiency and continuity.
home.subtitleConhecer: Our operations are guided by technical knowledge and a deep understanding of water jetting applications, supporting our clients in choosing the most suitable solution for every scenario.
home.texto1Conhecer: Technical support in defining pressure, flow rate, and system configuration.
home.texto2Conhecer: Analysis of the operational context and usage conditions.
home.texto3Conhecer: Technical guidance for the correct assembly of the set.
home.texto4Conhecer: Reduction of risks, operational failures, and unnecessary costs.
home.subtitleSuporte: Mamuth offers a technical support and after-sales structure focused on operational stability and safety over time, accompanying the client after the purchase.
home.texto1Suporte: Technical support for application, installation, and operation.
home.texto2Suporte: Guidance on best practices and preventive maintenance.
home.texto3Suporte: Ongoing support for adjustments, expansions, or solution upgrades.
home.subtitleParcerias: Mamuth maintains solid partnerships with world-class manufacturers, bringing to the Latin American market solutions recognized for engineering excellence, robustness, and operational reliability.
home.texto1Parcerias: Strategic partnership with Falch and Parker Polyflex, global benchmarks in water jetting and high pressure.
home.texto2Parcerias: Access to technologies developed under rigorous German engineering standards.
home.texto3Parcerias: Acting as the technical link between the manufacturer and the final customer.
home.texto4Parcerias: Technical support, application guidance, and after-sales follow-up in Latin America.

produtos.subtitleProdutos: Complete solutions in high-pressure equipment and industrial systems.
produtos.subtitleCards: High-quality equipment for all your industrial needs.
produtos.textMangueiras: Complete line of precision hydraulic equipment for diverse industrial applications.
produtos.textLavadoras: Robust equipment designed for high-demand industrial operations, featuring cutting-edge technology and maximum efficiency.
produtos.textVestimentas: High-resistance industrial protection for critical environments and high-risk sectors. Maximum safety for workers and equipment with guaranteed durability.
produtos.textRobo: In partnership with Falch, we offer ultra-high pressure robots that guarantee safety and efficiency in industrial cleaning, combining German technology and high productivity for demanding operations.
produtos.textBombas: High-performance industrial pumps, developed for demanding water jetting applications, with maximum reliability and operational efficiency.
produtos.textBicos: High-performance nozzles developed for water jetting applications, ensuring efficiency in cleaning, cutting, and residue removal at different pressure levels.
produtos.specs3Bicos: Compatibility with different pressures and applications
produtos.textAcessorioHidro: Complete line of water jetting accessories developed to ensure performance, safety, and efficiency in industrial operations.
produtos.specs3AcessoriosHidro: Tube clean and internal cleaning solutions
produtos.textAcessoriosLavadoras: Complete line of accessories for water jetting machines up to 600 bar, developed to ensure efficiency, control, and durability in industrial cleaning and maintenance operations.
produtos.textPecas: Solutions in parts and components for high and ultra-high pressure pumps, developed to ensure performance, reliability, and extended equipment service life.
produtos.desc2Lavadoras: Options with heated water up to 100 °C for heavy-duty cleaning
produtos.desc3Lavadoras: Flow rate sized according to the application
produtos.desc4Lavadoras: Robust structure for continuous industrial operation
produtos.desc1Vestimentas: Maximum Resistance: Built for harsh environments.
produtos.desc2Vestimentas: Versatile Use: Serves mining, oil, and gas industries.
produtos.desc3Vestimentas: Total Safety: Protection for personnel and machinery.
produtos.desc4Vestimentas: Complete Line: Apparel, boots, and accessories.
produtos.desc5Vestimentas: High Durability: Long service life under heavy stress.
produtos.desc1Robo: German Falch technology, a world leader in waterjetting
produtos.desc2Robo: Robotic solutions for high and ultra-high pressure operations
produtos.desc3Robo: Increased operational safety and reduced operator exposure
produtos.desc4Robo: High precision and control in applications
produtos.desc5Robo: Various models to meet diverse operational needs

cta.textCTA: Our technical team is ready to develop the perfect solution for your operation.

sobre.textSobre: Over 20 years of experience in high-pressure industrial solutions.
sobre.textMissao: To provide complete and innovative solutions in high-pressure equipment and industrial services, with exceptional quality, specialized technical support, and commitment to customer satisfaction, contributing to the increased productivity and operational efficiency of our partners.
sobre.textVisao: To be recognized as the leading high-pressure solutions company in Brazil, a benchmark in innovation, quality, and service; expanding our presence into new markets and consolidating strategic international partnerships, while always maintaining our commitment to excellence and sustainability.
sobre.textEstrutura: With over two decades of operation, Mamuth is a national benchmark in high-pressure solutions. We combine tradition and cutting-edge technology to deliver equipment that ensures maximum performance and absolute safety for your industry's most critical operations.
sobre.subtitleValores: The principles that guide our actions and decisions every day.
sobre.subtitleQualidade: Commitment to excellence in all our products and services.
sobre.subtitleInovacao: Constant search for advanced and efficient technological solutions.
sobre.subtitleConfiabilidade: A trusted partner for critical industrial operations.
sobre.subtitleSustentabilidade: Responsible practices that respect the environment.
sobre.subtitleExcelencia: Exceeding expectations in every project and service.
sobre.subtitleMarcas: We carefully select each partner to offer the best to the Brazilian market.
sobre.subtitleParker: Parker Polyflex is a global leader in motion and control technologies, providing essential components for water jetting systems, such as high-pressure hoses, fittings, and valves. Recognized for quality and reliability, the company has a strong presence in Brazil, offering safe and efficient solutions for industrial applications.
sobre.subtitleFalch: Falch is a German manufacturer specializing in water jetting equipment and high-pressure systems for industrial applications. With over 40 years of experience, it develops robust and innovative solutions recognized for efficiency, durability, and high performance in demanding operations.
sobre.subtitleTrajetoria: Decades of growth and innovation in the industrial sector.
sobre.text2003: Commencement of activities in São Paulo, focusing on providing industrial solutions for high-pressure applications.
sobre.text2008: Expansion of the product line and strengthening of Mamuth's presence in the industrial market.
sobre.text2013: Strengthening the company's presence across different industry segments, focusing on quality, technical support, and tailored solutions.
sobre.text2017: Growth of Mamuth's physical structure to support new demands, scale operations, and enhance market service efficiency.
sobre.text2019: Mamuth becomes an official Parker Polyflex distributor, expanding its portfolio with world-renowned high and ultra-high pressure solutions.
sobre.text2025: Start of the partnership with Falch, a German manufacturer and global benchmark in ultra-high pressure water jetting equipment.
sobre.text2026: Opening of the strategic unit in Macaé to primarily serve the offshore, naval, and oil & gas sectors.

footer.textFooter: Heavyweight Quality, Guaranteed Strength. Complete solutions in industrial equipment and water jetting.
footer.endereco: Street Curuçá 1149 Vila Maria - São Paulo/SP, CEP: 02120-002
footer.endereco2: Avenue Pref. Aristeu Ferreira da Silva, 321 Novo Cavaleiros - Macaé/RJ

noticias.subtitleNoticias: Stay up to date with the latest news and events from Mamuth.
noticias.subtitleCards: Follow our launches, partnerships, and updates.
noticias.titleNoticia1: 5 Years Participating in the World’s Largest Bioenergy Fair.
noticias.textoNoticia1: For over five years, Mamuth Hydro has walked side by side with the leaders of bioenergy at FENASUCRO & AGROCANA. With more than 53,000 visitors, 1,600 exhibiting brands, and a business environment that only the world's largest trade show for the bioenergy chain can offer. In 2026, we will be in Sertãozinho once again, from August 11 to 14, presenting high-performance hydraulic solutions for those driving the future of the energy matrix. Those who know us, come back. Those who are Mamuth, make their presence felt.
noticias.titleNoticia2: R$ 12 Billion in Business. And You, Where Will You Be?
noticias.textoNoticia2: As the naval and offshore industry prepares to move billions at the 20th Navalshore, Mamuth Hydro has already secured its spot. We know that an event which gathered more than 18,000 professionals and the largest shipyards and oil companies in Latin America is the right place for those seeking solutions that truly deliver.
noticias.btnNoticia2: Schedule a Meeting with Our Team

contato.subtitleContato: We are ready to meet your needs and answer your questions.

form.conheceu: How did you hear about Mamuth?

fenasucro.title: Fenasucro Fair
fenasucro.subtitle: 5 Years Participating in the World's Largest Bioenergy Fair.
fenasucro.texto1: FENASUCRO & AGROCANA is recognized as the world's largest trade fair dedicated to the bioenergy production chain, bringing together companies, specialists, and leaders from the sugar-energy sector to present innovations, technologies, and solutions focused on industrial efficiency and sustainability. Held annually in Sertãozinho, São Paulo, the fair has established itself as one of the main meeting points for the bioenergy, biofuels, and renewable energy markets, promoting strategic networking, business generation, and high-level technical debates.
fenasucro.texto2: Mamuth has participated in Fenasucro for over five consecutive years, reinforcing its commitment to innovation, quality, and an active presence in the sector's development. Throughout these editions, the company has presented its solutions and technologies focused on high operational performance, strengthening partnerships, expanding its market visibility, and closely following the trends that drive the industry. This constant presence demonstrates Mamuth’s solid positioning as a technical reference and strategic partner for the sugar-energy sector.

navalshore.title: Navalshore Fair
navalshore.subtitle: R$ 12 Billion in Business. And You, Where Will You Be?
navalshore.texto1: Navalshore is the leading event for the naval and offshore industry in Latin America, bringing together shipyards, shipowners, technology providers, energy companies, and maritime sector specialists. Recognized as one of the most important showcases for innovation and business in the field, the fair presents solutions for shipbuilding, maintenance, port operations, and offshore exploration, while promoting strategic debates on the future of the maritime industry in Brazil and worldwide.
navalshore.texto2: Held in the state of Rio de Janeiro, Navalshore connects key market players, creating an environment conducive to qualified networking, the generation of commercial opportunities, and the strengthening of strategic partnerships. The event also highlights advances in technology, operational safety, and production efficiency—fundamental pillars for the sustainable growth of the naval and offshore sector.
navalshore.texto3: In 2026, Mamuth makes its debut at Navalshore, marking a new milestone in its trajectory of expansion and strategic positioning. Our presence at the event reinforces the company’s commitment to expanding its operations in the maritime sector, presenting high-performance solutions for demanding industrial operations. This debut represents a significant step in consolidating Mamuth as a reliable and innovative partner across different heavy industry segments.

mangueiras.subtitle: Robust solutions and cutting-edge technology for your industrial operation.
mangueiras.subtitlePoliamida2800: APPLICATION: Used in systems for cleaning, unclogging, waste removal, and surface preparation using high-pressure water jetting. They are also popularly known as pigtails or flexible lances.
mangueiras.subtitlePoliamida1500: APPLICATION: Used in systems for cleaning, unclogging, debris removal, and surface preparation through High-Pressure Water Jetting. They are also popularly known as pigtails or flexible lances.
mangueiras.subtitleWaterblast: Recommended for cleaning systems, unclogging, debris removal, and surface preparation using Water Jetting. Inner tube manufactured in water-resistant synthetic rubber, reinforced with braided steel wire spirals, and protected by a synthetic rubber cover resistant to ozone, weather conditions, and heat.
mangueiras.subtitleMangueira10k: Recommended for cleaning systems, unclogging, debris removal, and surface preparation using Water Jetting. Inner tube manufactured in water-resistant synthetic rubber, reinforced by braided steel wire spirals, and covered with a layer of synthetic rubber resistant to ozone, weather, and heat.
mangueiras.subtitleNiples: Fittings, Unions, Adapters, and Couplings are essential items for joining, coupling, and adapting hoses and accessories. MAMUTH offers a complete line of these items to meet every need. We also handle custom requests and manufacture tailor-made items upon order. Our portfolio is divided into two lines: one limited up to 1,500 bar and another for pressures up to 2,800 bar. All these items are manufactured in high-performance stainless steel.
mangueiras.subtitleNiplesAdap: Fittings, Unions, Adapters, and Couplings are essential items for joining, coupling, and adapting hoses and accessories. MAMUTH offers a complete line of these items to meet every need. We also handle custom requests and manufacture tailor-made items upon order. Our portfolio is divided into two lines: one limited up to 1,500 bar and another for pressures up to 2,800 bar. All these items are manufactured in high-performance stainless steel.
mangueiras.subtitleLuvasUniao: Fittings indicated for pumps, hoses, and water jetting accessories with pressures up to 1,500 bar (22,000 psi).
mangueiras.titleLuvasEmenda: UAP Splice Sleeves up to 3,200 bar
mangueiras.subtitleLuvasEmenda: Fittings indicated for pumps, hoses, lances, and water jetting accessories with pressures up to 3,200 bar (46,400 psi).
mangueiras.subtitleEngates: The ER12 and ER20 quick coupling models are ideal for joining hoses in a practical and secure manner. These couplings feature a threaded nut that connects the male and female ends, eliminating the need for a wrench for torqueing, as only manual tightening is required.
mangueiras.titleLuvasDistribuidorUAP: UAP Y, T, and 90° Elbow Manifolds
mangueiras.subtitleLuvasDistribuidorUAP: Manifolds are used to split the water flow and increase the number of hoses to be used in Ultra-High Pressure operations.
mangueiras.subtitleDistribuidorSAP: Manifolds are used to split the water flow and increase the number of hoses in use, allowing multiple operations to occur simultaneously. With these devices, it is possible to optimize the use of water resources by directing water to different application points in an efficient and controlled manner. Furthermore, the manifolds ensure uniform flow distribution, which is essential for maintaining proper pressure across all outlets, resulting in higher productivity and precision in operations.

lavadoras.subtitle: Robust solutions and cutting-edge technology for your industrial operation.
lavadoras.subtitle50cv: Typhoon-Jet water jetting machines are ideal for exclusive and fast-paced tasks. Equipped with a three-phase electric motor, they provide power and efficiency for cleaning tough surfaces. Their robust construction and high-quality components ensure durability and consistent performance, even under the most demanding conditions, while the design allows for easy mobility and positioning in various environments.
lavadoras.subtitle500: The Typhoon-Jet 500 is a high-pressure machine designed to deliver exceptional performance in extremely heavy-duty cleaning across industrial, agricultural, and commercial environments. With a pressure of 500 bar, a flow rate of 20 L/min, and 25 HP of power, this equipment ensures superior results for any cleaning challenge.
lavadoras.subtitle350: The Typhoon-Jet 350 is a high-pressure machine designed to deliver exceptional performance in heavy-duty cleaning across industrial, agricultural, and commercial environments. With a pressure of 350 bar, a flow rate of 17 L/min, and 15 HP of power, this equipment ensures superior results for any cleaning challenge.
lavadoras.subtitle200: The Typhoon-Jet 200 is a high-pressure machine designed to deliver exceptional performance in heavy-duty cleaning across industrial, agricultural, and commercial environments. With a pressure of 200 bar, a flow rate of 45 L/min, and 20 HP of power, this equipment ensures superior results for any cleaning challenge.
lavadoras.subtitle170: The Typhoon-Jet 170 is a high-pressure machine designed to deliver exceptional performance in moderate cleaning tasks across industrial, agricultural, and commercial environments. With a pressure of 170 bar (2,465 PSI), a flow rate of 12 L/min (720 L/h), and 5 HP of power, this equipment ensures effective results for moderate-intensity cleaning challenges.
lavadoras.subtitleHot: The Typhoon-Hot is a high-pressure hot water washer (up to 100°C), ideal for heavy-duty industrial use. It combines high pressure, temperature, and flow rate to efficiently remove grease and tough residues. Featuring a triplex pump, gasoline or electric options, and a reinforced frame, it ensures performance, versatility, and reliability across various sectors.

vestimentas.subtitleMacacao: Protective coveralls indicated for workers in the sugar and ethanol industry and/or operations with SAP model water jetting pumps. Made of a double layer of high-tenacity synthetic woven fabric, externally waterproofed with PVC, it features waterproofed seams.
vestimentas.subtitleVestimenta: Protective garment indicated for workers in the Marine, Oil & Gas, and Petrochemical sectors, and/or operations with UAP model water jetting pumps. Made of a triple layer of high-tenacity synthetic woven fabric, externally waterproofed with PVC, it features waterproofed seams.
vestimentas.subtitleMangueira: Protective cover indicated for hoses operating at pressures up to 2,800 bar. It provides protection in the event of an accidental rupture by forming a shield, preventing high-pressure water from hitting the operator.
vestimentas.subtitleAir: The Air System 200 Mamuth is a cooling system that provides purified air for up to three water jetting operators simultaneously. With adjustable temperatures ranging from -5°C to +20°C, it reduces thermal fatigue and increases productivity in harsh environments, ensuring comfort and operational safety through a mobile and efficient chassis.

Robo.subtitleWorker: The Falch Robo Line Worker 250 is an ultra-high pressure water jetting robot designed for heavy-duty industrial cleaning. It operates at up to 3,000 bar, removing severe scaling with high precision. Robust, safe, and efficient, it features IP65/IP55 protection, electric operation, and a compact design, ensuring high productivity, mobility, and reliability for demanding applications.
Robo.subtitleMagnetico: The Climb Rob is a versatile magnetic robot designed for high-pressure and ultra-high-pressure water jetting on vertical and inclined metallic surfaces. Equipped with a powerful magnetic system, it ensures safe and stable adhesion, allowing for automated cleaning and surface preparation in the marine, oil & gas, and industrial sectors with maximum efficiency and operator safety.
Robo.subtitleLift250: El Lift Worker 250 Beam es un equipo de hidrojet profesional para alta presión. Con cubierta de protección y extracción de residuos, garantiza productividad y seguridad en la remoción de revestimientos. Su diseño optimiza la distancia del chorro y reduce la oxidación, proporcionando superficies limpias, secas y con bajo nivel de ruido.

bombas.subtitlePump125: 125 kW pump for high performance and pressure up to 3,000 bar. German technology focused on durability and stability, ensuring maximum efficiency and low operational cost in extreme conditions.
bombas.subtitlePump250: 250 kW pump for high volumes and pressure up to 3,000 bar. German technology featuring Quick Check for maintenance in minutes, ensuring maximum availability and efficiency in critical operations.
bombas.subtitlePump500: 500 kW pump for ultra capacity and pressure up to 3,000 bar. German technology featuring Quick Check for agile maintenance, ensuring maximum productivity and high performance in large-scale operations.
bombas.subtitle600: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 600 bar and a flow rate of up to 35 L/min.
bombas.subtitle500: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 500 bar and a flow rate of 20 L/min.
bombas.subtitle350: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 350 bar and a flow rate of 19 L/min.
bombas.subtitle250: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 250 bar and a flow rate of 17 L/min.
bombas.subtitle200: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 200 bar and a flow rate of 45 L/min.
bombas.subtitle50ff: Triplex pump for water jetting machines or hydrostatic testing, with a pressure of 160 bar and a flow rate of 150 L/min.

bicos.subtitleRotativo: Nozzles indicated for water jetting machines up to 500 bar. They can be used for surface cleaning, pipe jetting, or abrasive blasting.
bicos.subtitleSafira: Nozzles or inserts are used in accessories applied in the water jetting process, such as high-pressure guns, rotary tools, spray bars, and rotary nozzles, among others.
bicos.subtitlePortaSafira: The 3/8” Sapphire Nozzle mounting holder is an essential component in cleaning, blasting, or cutting operations using Ultra-High Pressure (UHP) guns. This holder is designed to ensure secure and stable nozzle fixation, providing precision and efficiency during use.
bicos.subtitleRetoLeque: The holder for Form 4 Straight Nozzles and Form 19 Fan Nozzles is primarily used in cleaning, blasting, or cutting operations with high-pressure guns. They are recommended for applications up to 1,500 bar / 21,750 psi.
bicos.subtitleRotativo600: Nozzles indicated for water jetting machines up to 500 bar. They can be used for surface cleaning, pipe jetting, or abrasive blasting.
bicos.subtitleTorpedo12: Specific protective and cleaning nozzle for pipes.
bicos.subtitleSharkJet: The Shark-Jet 22K and 40K is a self-propelled rotary tool indicated for jetting, cleaning, and surface preparation of flat or irregular surfaces.
bicos.subtitleRotativoTitan: The Titan Nozzle is a self-propelled rotary nozzle developed for general pipe cleaning and unclogging with pressures between 1,000 bar and 2,800 bar. The rotary nozzle heads are manufactured in different orifice configurations.
bicos.subtitleBicoReto: Nozzles or inserts are used in accessories applied in the water jetting process, such as high-pressure guns, rotary tools, spray bars, and rotary nozzles, among others.
bicos.subtitleFoguetinho: The 'Foguetinho' type fixed nozzle is indicated for cleaning and unclogging the internal walls of heat exchanger tubes, evaporators, and general pipe lines.
bicos.subtitleFerret: The Ferret 22K Self-Propelled Nozzle is indicated for operations with pressures up to 1,600 bar and a flow rate of 80 L/min. With this tool, it is possible to perform unclogging and cleaning of pipes between 2' and 6', especially in pipes with 90° bends.
bicos.subtitleAttack: State-of-the-art equipment for demanding industrial applications.

hidroacesso.subtitleViper40k: The system is designed to isolate the pneumatic circuit, ensuring that water pressure and lance rotation are activated only when both triggers are pressed simultaneously, providing precise and secure control.
hidroacesso.subtitlePneumatica: They provide greater robustness and durability, ensuring the equipment withstands demanding working conditions without compromising structural integrity.
hidroacesso.subtitlePFechado: Developed to withstand extreme conditions, providing durability and a long service life for the equipment.
hidroacesso.subtitlePAberto: State-of-the-art equipment for demanding industrial applications.
hidroacesso.subtitleTubeclean: A tool designed to assist the operator in the efficient cleaning of evaporators and various pipelines, especially in vertical positions. Ideal for removing residues and obstructions, ensuring proper maintenance and continuous system operation.
hidroacesso.subtitlePowerBox: The Power Box MAMUTH 2,800 Bar is an accessory that must be used in conjunction with the MTP 2,800 Bar Double Trigger Gun or the Viper 40K Rotary Gun.
hidroacesso.titlePedal: MTPA Open Flow Foot Pedal 1,400 Bar
hidroacesso.subtitlePedal: The MTPA Open Flow Foot Pedal 1,400 Bar is indicated for work where the water jetting operator needs to use both hands, ideal for cleaning heat exchangers or general piping. This accessory provides greater safety and comfort as the operator has full control over the water flow release with their feet.
hidroacesso.subtitleMalha: A safety device used in hose and pipe joints to prevent sudden movement or whipping in the event of a connection failure.
hidroacesso.subtitleLanca: Known as Rods or Lances, these are used as flow conductors or as extensions for nozzles and hoses. They can be manufactured in any length.
hidroacesso.subtitleLaco: A safety device used in hose and pipe joints to prevent sudden movement or whipping in the event of a connection failure.
hidroacesso.subtitleDistorcedor: The Swivel is a safety item that, when used with the hose, eliminates torsional stress on the terminal, thus avoiding premature breakage and subsequent accidents.
hidroacesso.subtitleCabecote: The NLB 3D Torrent Head is an advanced tool specifically designed for efficient tank cleaning. This device not only drastically reduces cleaning time but also provides total operational safety by eliminating the need for an operator in confined spaces, which is essential for minimizing risks.

hidrolavadoras.subtitlePistolas: Spray guns and lances designed for high-pressure washers.
hidrolavadoras.subtitleValvula550: Pressure regulating valve (By-Pass) with safety function.
hidrolavadoras.subtitleValvula350: Pressure regulating valve (By-Pass) with safety function.
hidrolavadoras.subtitleValvula200: Pressure regulating valve (By-Pass) with safety function. Suitable for high-flow pumps.
hidrolavadoras.subtitleValvula660: Safety valve that limits the maximum pressure of the high-pressure system. When the pressure limit is exceeded, the valve opens to release the excess pressure.

pecasBombas.subtitlePecas: MAMUTH offers a complete line of parts for High and Ultra-High Pressure Pumps, covering a wide range of brands and models available on the market. Our parts are of our own manufacture, which allows us to guarantee high standards of quality and durability.

poliamida2800.title: Polyamide UAP 2800
poliamida2800.texto1: All Mamuth hoses are tested in a hydrostatic test bench at 6.900 bar (100.050 psi) and a Hydrostatic Test Certificate is issued.
poliamida2800.texto2: APPLICATION Used in cleaning, unblocking, residue removal and surface preparation systems with the use of Hydrojetting. They are also commonly known as “rabichos” or “flexible lances”;
poliamida2800.texto3: CONSTRUCTION Internally made of rigid polyamide, wrapped by layers of braided steel wires and covered with polyamide;
poliamida2800.texto4: OPERATING TEMPERATURE Suitable for operations in temperatures between - 10°C and +70°C;
poliamida2800.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

poliamida1500.title: Polyamide SAP 1500
poliamida1500.texto1: All Mamuth hoses are tested in a hydrostatic test bench at 6.900 bar (100.050 psi) and a Hydrostatic Test Certificate is issued.
poliamida1500.texto2: APPLICATION Used in cleaning, unblocking, residue removal and surface preparation systems with the use of Hydrojetting. They are also commonly known as “rabichos” or “flexible lances”;
poliamida1500.texto3: CONSTRUCTION Internally made of rigid polyamide, wrapped by layers of braided steel wires and covered with polyamide;
poliamida1500.texto4: OPERATING TEMPERATURE Suitable for operations in temperatures between - 10°C and +70°C;
poliamida1500.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

waterblast.title: Waterblast Hose
waterblast.texto1: APPLICATION: Recommended for cleaning, unclogging, waste removal, and surface preparation systems utilizing High-Pressure Water Jetting (Hydroblasting);
waterblast.texto2: CONSTRUCTION: Inner tube manufactured from water-resistant synthetic rubber, wrapped with spiral-wound steel wire reinforcements, and covered with a layer of synthetic rubber resistant to ozone, weather, and heat;
waterblast.texto3: WORKING TEMPERATURE: Suitable for operations within a temperature range from -10°C to +70°C. Maximum intermittent working temperature: +93°C.
waterblast.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

10000psi.title: 10,000 PSI Hose
10000psi.texto1: APPLICATION: Recommended for cleaning, unclogging, waste removal, and surface preparation systems utilizing High-Pressure Water Jetting (Hydroblasting);
10000psi.texto2: CONSTRUCTION: Inner tube manufactured from water-resistant synthetic rubber, wrapped with spiral-wound steel wire reinforcements, and covered with a layer of synthetic rubber resistant to ozone, weather, and heat;
10000psi.texto3: WORKING TEMPERATURE: Suitable for operations within a temperature range from -40°C to +100°C. Maximum intermittent working temperature: +121°C.
10000psi.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

NiplesM24.title: M24DKO-1 Nipples
NiplesM24.texto1: Fittings, Unions, Adapters, and Couplings are essential items for joining, coupling, and adapting hoses and accessories. MAMUTH offers a complete line of these items to meet all requirements. We also accommodate custom requests and manufacture made-to-order items. Our portfolio is divided into two lines: a range limited up to 1,500 BAR, and a range that can be used at pressures up to 2,800 BAR—all of these items are manufactured from high-performance stainless steel.
NiplesM24.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

NiplesAdaptador.title: HP Adapter Nipples
NiplesAdaptador.texto1: Fittings, Unions, Adapters, and Couplings are essential items for joining, coupling, and adapting hoses and accessories. MAMUTH offers a complete line of these items to meet all requirements. We also accommodate custom requests and manufacture made-to-order items. Our portfolio is divided into two lines: a range limited up to 1,500 BAR, and a range that can be used at pressures up to 2,800 BAR—all of these items are manufactured from high-performance stainless steel.
NiplesAdaptador.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

luvasUniao.title: Union Sleeves
luvasUniao.texto1: Fittings designed for pumps, hoses, and hydroblasting accessories with operating pressures up to 1,500 bar (22,000 psi).
luvasUniao.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

LuvasEmenda.title: UHP Splicing Sleeves
LuvasEmenda.texto1: Fittings designed for pumps, hoses, lances, and hydroblasting accessories with operating pressures up to 3,200 bar (46,400 psi).

Engates.title: Quick Couplings
Engates.texto1: The ER12 and ER20 Quick Coupling models are designed to join hoses in a practical and secure manner. These couplings feature a threaded nut that screws together to engage the male and female ends, eliminating the need for a wrench to torque the connection—hand-tightening is sufficient.
Engates.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

DistribuidoresUAP.title: UHP Y, T, and 90° Elbow Manifolds
DistribuidoresUAP.texto1: Manifolds are used to split the water flow and multiply the number of hoses to be used in Ultra-High Pressure applications.
DistribuidoresUAP.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

DistribuidoresSAP.title: HP Flow Manifolds
DistribuidoresSAP.texto1: Manifolds are used to split the water flow and multiply the number of hoses to be utilized, allowing multiple operations to occur simultaneously. With these devices, it is possible to optimize the use of water resources, directing the water to different application points in an efficient and controlled manner. Furthermore, the manifolds ensure a uniform flow distribution, which is essential for maintaining proper pressure across all outlets, resulting in higher productivity and precision in operations.
DistribuidoresSAP.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

50cv.title: Typhoon-Jet 50 HP
50cv.texto1: Typhoon-Jet hydroblasting units are ideal for highly specific, fast-paced jobs. Equipped with a water-cooled Diesel engine, they deliver reliable power and efficiency in demanding environments. The integrated digital panel facilitates startup and allows monitoring of water and oil temperatures, battery charge, engine RPM, and other critical metrics, ensuring precise tracking during operation. Furthermore, its practical design allows for easy delivery and positioning across different locations.
50cv.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

500bar.title: Typhoon-Jet 500: The Complete Solution for Heavy-Duty Cleaning
500bar.texto1: The Typhoon-Jet 500 is a high-pressure equipment engineered to deliver exceptional performance in heavy-duty cleaning across industrial, agricultural, and commercial environments. This equipment guarantees superior results in any cleaning challenge.
500bar.texto2: Its robust and heavy-duty structure is built to withstand the most demanding requirements, ensuring durability and reliability even under the most extreme conditions. The Typhoon-Jet 500 provides stability and easy maneuverability during use, making it ideal for a variety of heavy-duty cleaning applications.
500bar.texto3: Furthermore, the Typhoon-Jet 500 is easy to operate and maintain, providing a efficient cleaning experience without complications. With it, you can remove heavy dirt, grease, oil, and other residues quickly and effectively, saving time and effort.
500bar.texto4: Ideal for gas stations, medium and large car washes, industries, construction companies, transportation firms, bus and tourism companies, commerce, condominiums, agricultural cleaning services, among others.
500bar.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

170bar.title: Typhoon-Jet 170: The Complete Solution for Moderate Cleaning
170bar.texto1: The Typhoon-Jet 170 is a high-pressure equipment engineered to deliver exceptional performance in moderate-duty cleaning across industrial, agricultural, and commercial environments. This equipment guarantees superior results in any cleaning challenge.
170bar.texto2: Its robust and heavy-duty structure is built to withstand the most demanding requirements, ensuring durability and reliability. The Typhoon-Jet 170 provides stability and easy maneuverability during use, making it ideal for a variety of applications.

hot.title: Typhoon-Jet Hot
hot.texto1: The Typhoon-Jet Hot is a industrial hot water high-pressure washer, engineered to deliver high performance, efficiency, and operational reliability in heavy-duty cleaning applications. With an operating temperature of up to 100 °C, the equipment maximizes the removal of oily residues, grease, encrustations, and stubborn dirt by combining the power of high pressure with the efficiency of hot water.
hot.texto2: Its robust construction, paired with an industrial triplex pump, ensures greater durability, operational stability, and excellent performance in continuous use. Available in gasoline and electric versions, the Typhoon-Jet Hot offers operational versatility, maintaining pressures up to 280 bar (4,000 PSI) and a flow rate of 15 L/min, featuring an assembly designed to provide productivity, resistance, and daily convenience.
hot.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

sap.title: Hydro-Shell HP Protective Suit
sap.texto1: Protective suit designed for workers in the sugar-alcohol sector and/or operations with HP (High Pressure) hydroblasting pumps. Manufactured with a double layer of high-tenacity woven synthetic fabric, externally waterproofed with PVC, it features waterproofed seams. The front closure is achieved through two zippers covered by a storm flap, and the fixed hood can be adjusted by a drawstring with a cord lock and aglet. Cuff and leg hems are adjustable via Velcro. It includes a protective neck flap with a rear Velcro closure. For enhanced comfort, it features internal support straps with quick-release height adjustments, helping to support the weight of the suit.
sap.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

uap.title: Hydro-Shell UHP Protective Suit
uap.texto1: Protective suit designed for workers in the Marine, Oil & Gas, and Petrochemical sectors, and/or operations with UHP (Ultra-High Pressure) hydroblasting pumps. Manufactured with a triple layer of high-tenacity woven synthetic fabric, externally waterproofed with PVC, it features waterproofed seams. The front closure is achieved through quick-connect metallic rings covered by a storm flap, and the fixed hood can be adjusted by a drawstring with a cord lock and aglet. Cuff and leg hems are adjustable via Velcro. It includes a protective neck flap with a rear Velcro closure. For enhanced comfort, it features internal support straps with quick-release height adjustments, helping to support the weight of the suit.
uap.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

capa.title: Hose Safety Sleeve
capa.texto1: Protective sleeve designed for hoses operating at pressures up to 2800 Bar. It provides protection in the event of an accidental rupture by forming a shield that prevents high-pressure water from striking the operator.
capa.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

air.title: Air System 200
air.texto1: Air Cooling System for Hydroblasting Operators
air.texto2: The Mamuth Air System 200 was developed to provide greater thermal comfort and safety for workers engaged in industrial cleaning and hydroblasting operations, especially in high-temperature environments or confined spaces.
air.texto3: The equipment supplies cooled and purified air to the interior of the protective suit, contributing to the reduction of thermal fatigue, improvement of operational performance, and increased productivity during prolonged activities.
air.texto4: With an adjustable temperature control, the system can reduce the suit's internal temperature down to 18 °C, offering a more comfortable and efficient working condition. The temperature adjustment can vary from -5 °C to +20 °C, allowing adaptation according to the specific operational needs and environmental conditions.
air.texto6: Capacity to supply up to 03 operators simultaneously in hydroblasting operations;
air.texto7: Integrated air purification system, ensuring higher quality in the air supplied to the operator;
air.texto8: 03 PU hoses (10 mm) with a length of 12 meters, featuring a protective jacket and thermal insulation;
air.texto9: Wheeled chassis, facilitating equipment transport and maneuvering in the field;
air.texto10: The ideal solution for industrial operations that require safety, thermal comfort, and high operational performance.
air.texto11: Mamuth Air System 200: more comfort, safety, and productivity for hydroblasting operations in harsh environments.
air.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

line.title: Robot Line Worker 250
line.texto1: The Robo Line Worker 250, developed by the German company Falch, is a high-performance hydroblasting robot designed for floor and surface cleaning and preparation using ultra-high pressure. Engineered for demanding industrial operations, this equipment combines robustness, precision, and advanced technology to remove severe encrustations, industrial residues, coatings, mineral deposits, and other highly adherent contaminants.
line.texto2: Capable of operating at pressures up to 3,000 bar (4,351 PSI), the Line Worker 250 delivers an extremely efficient level of cleaning, ensuring high performance even in the most challenging applications. Its operating system allows for greater process control, stability during work, and reduced operator exposure, making operations safer and more productive.
line.texto3: Featuring a robust structure, IP65/IP55 protection, and a build tailored for industrial environments, the equipment is designed for continuous operation, offering high reliability and durability. Its compact and functional design facilitates mobility and application across different types of surfaces and work environments.
line.texto4: Equipped with a 400 V / 50 Hz electrical system and developed for intensive use, the Robo Line Worker 250 maintains high operational efficiency while ensuring precision and consistency in technical cleaning results.
line.texto5: This robot represents an advanced solution for automated hydroblasting operations, providing significant gains in safety, productivity, and quality within the industrial cleaning process.
line.texto6: Operating pressure up to 3,000 bar (4,351 PSI)
line.texto7: German Falch technology, a global benchmark in hydroblasting
line.texto8: High efficiency in removing severe encrustations and contaminants
line.texto9: Robust structure with IP65 / IP55 protection
line.texto10: Stable operation with enhanced safety for the operator
line.texto11: Equipment designed for demanding industrial applications
line.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

lift.title: Lift Worker 250 Beam
lift.texto1: The Lift Worker 250 Beam is an equipment developed for professional high and ultra-high pressure hydroblasting operations, offering high productivity, operational safety, and precise control during coating removal, encrustation removal, and surface preparation.
lift.texto2: Engineered for industrial applications, the system allows for greater blasting efficiency, noise reduction via a spray protection cover, better control of the distance between the nozzle and the surface, and efficient wastewater extraction, contributing to faster drying and reduced surface oxidation (flash rust) formation.
lift.texto3: Featuring a robust structure, IP65/IP55 protection, and a build tailored for industrial environments, the equipment is designed for continuous operation, offering high reliability and durability. Its compact and functional design facilitates mobility and application across different types of surfaces and work environments.
lift.texto4: Equipped with a 400 V / 50 Hz electrical system and developed for intensive use, the Robo Line Worker 250 maintains high operational efficiency while ensuring precision and consistency in technical cleaning results.
lift.texto5: This robot represents an advanced solution for automated hydroblasting operations, providing significant gains in safety, productivity, and quality within the industrial cleaning process.

magnetico.title: Magnetic Robot Climb Rob
magnetico.texto1: The Climb Rob 250 is a magnetic robot developed for high and ultra-high pressure hydroblasting on vertical, horizontal, and inclined metallic surfaces. Its magnetic attachment ensures stability during operation, allowing for greater safety, productivity, and precision in cleaning, coating removal, and surface preparation.
magnetico.texto2: Engineered for demanding industrial applications, the equipment reduces the need for manual work at heights, improves operational ergonomics, and enables remote control of the process, providing enhanced safety for the operator and superior performance compared to manual spray guns.
magnetico.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

falch125.title: Falch PUMP 125KW
falch125.texto1: The Falch FA 125 is a high-performance piston pump engineered for industrial applications that require power, reliability, and operational efficiency. Delivering up to 125 kW of power and capable of operating at pressures up to 3,000 bar, this equipment provides top-tier performance even under the most demanding conditions.
falch125.texto2: Designed with German Falch engineering, the FA 125 is recommended for operations such as heavy-duty industrial cleaning, hydrodemolition, the marine sector, oil and gas, mining, and other applications that demand high pressure combined with stability and durability.
falch125.texto3: Its design blends mechanical robustness with technologies that reduce downtime and increase energy efficiency, providing lower operating costs over time.
falch125.texto5: The Quick Check system was developed to ensure fast and simple interventions directly at the job site, significantly reducing equipment downtime.
falch125.texto7: Plunger and seal replacement in about 30 minutes.
falch125.texto9: This system allows for greater machine availability and higher productivity in the field.
falch125.texto10: Green Power technology delivers high performance with lower energy consumption, thanks to an optimized sealing system and the mechanical efficiency of the assembly.

rotativoR.title: Rotary Nozzle R
rotativoR.texto1: The R model rotary nozzle was specifically developed for cleaning and removing encrustations from the internal walls of heat exchanger tubes, evaporators, and pipe lines in general. These nozzles are available in several diameters and with inserts of varied orifices, sized according to the flow rate.
rotativoR.texto4: All nozzles (with the exception of the R10 model) have the option of NPT standard thread.

safiram10.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

portasafira.title: Sapphire Nozzle Holder
portasafira.texto1: The 3/8” Sapphire Nozzle Holder is an essential component in cleaning, blasting, or cutting operations using Ultra-High Pressure (UHP) spray guns. This holder is designed to ensure a secure and stable attachment of the nozzle, providing precision and efficiency during use.
portasafira.texto2: Recommended for applications involving pressures up to 2,800 bar (40,600 psi), the holder is ideal for jobs that require high performance and reliability, ensuring equipment durability and integrity even under extreme conditions.
portasafira.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

portareto.title: Straight and Fan Nozzle Holder
portareto.texto1: The holder for the Form 4 Straight Nozzle and Form 19 Fan Nozzle is primarily used in cleaning, blasting, or cutting operations with high-pressure spray guns. They are recommended for applications up to 1,500 bar / 21,750 psi.
portareto.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

rotativo600.title: Rotating Nozzle 600 Bar
rotativo600.texto1: Rotating nozzles are designed to provide a powerful and efficient
rotativo600.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

shrakjet.title: Shark-Jet 22K and 40K Nozzle
shrakjet.texto1: The Shark-Jet 22K and 40K is a self-propelled rotary tool designed for blasting, cleaning, and surface preparation of flat or irregular surfaces. Available in two configurations: the first option operates at pressures up to 1,500 bar (22,000 psi) with a flow rate up to 40 L/min; the second option is configured to operate at pressures up to 2,800 bar (40,000 psi) with a flow rate up to 30 L/min. This tool is used in conjunction with a hydroblasting spray gun. Its internal components feature an oil lubrication and cooling system, as well as a hydraulic brake to limit rotation speed. This tool utilizes 4 Sapphire Nozzles (7/16-20 UNF) in the 2,800 bar configuration, and 2 Attack Nozzles (1/4 NPT) in the 1,500 bar configuration, all with offset angles, which provides a controlled rotation and a higher cleaning performance over a larger surface attack area.
shrakjet.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

rotativotitan.title: Titan Rotary Nozzle
rotativotitan.texto1: The Titan Nozzle is a self-propelled rotary nozzle developed for general pipe cleaning and unblocking, operating at pressures between 1,000 bar and 2,800 bar. The rotary nozzle heads are manufactured in different orifice configurations. The Polisher head features four radial orifices, the Unplugger features five orifices, while the Universal features seven orifices for simultaneous cutting, cleaning, and polishing. The nozzle is manufactured from high-performance stainless steel, which provides a long service life and reduces operating costs. The Titan Nozzle is available in various sizes and configurations, with inserts or heads available in the Polisher, Unplugger, and Universal models.
rotativotitan.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

bicoreto.title: Straight and Fan Nozzles
bicoreto.texto1: Nozzles or inserts are used in accessories applied within the hydroblasting process, such as: Spray Guns, Rotary Tools, Spray Bars, Rotary Nozzles, among others. The configurations must be reviewed for each application, taking into account the specifications and limitations of pressure and flow rate for each piece of equipment or process. They can be applied to cutting, cleaning, stripping, unblocking, and surface preparation processes.
bicoreto.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

foguetinho.title: Fixed Rocket Nozzle
foguetinho.texto1: The fixed Rocket type nozzle is designed for cleaning and unblocking the internal walls of heat exchanger tubes, evaporators, and pipe lines in general. These nozzles are available in several different diameters and with orifices sized according to the flow rate. This model features 8 orifices, with 2 forward-facing attack jets and 6 rear-facing cleaning and propulsion jets.
foguetinho.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

ferret22.title: Ferret 22K Nozzle
ferret22.texto1: The Ferret 22K self-propelled nozzle is designed for operations with pressures up to 1,600 bar and a flow rate of 80 L/min. This tool enables the unblocking and cleaning of 2” to 6” pipes, performing exceptionally well in pipelines that feature 90° bends.
ferret22.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

viper40k.title: Viper 40k Rotary Spray Gun
viper40k.texto1: Pneumatic Circuit Isolation Actuation System: The system is designed to isolate the pneumatic circuit, ensuring that water pressure and lance rotation are only activated when both triggers are pressed simultaneously, providing precise and secure control.
viper40k.texto2: Enhanced Operator Safety: Water flow and lance rotation are only activated when both triggers are pressed at the same time, minimizing the risk of accidental activation and significantly increasing safety during operation.
viper40k.texto3: Easy Maintenance: The system is engineered to allow fast and efficient maintenance, reducing downtime and ensuring the equipment remains operational with minimal interruption.
viper40k.texto4: Maximum Working Pressure (2,800 bar): Capable of withstanding and operating under ultra-high pressures, making it ideal for industrial applications that require exceptional force and performance.
viper40k.texto5: Compatible with the MAMUTH 40K Power Box: Must be used in conjunction with the MAMUTH 40K Power Box, ensuring perfect integration and optimized performance in high-pressure operations.
viper40k.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

pneumatica2g.title: MTPT 2G Pneumatic Spray Gun
pneumatica2g.texto1: Two Handles Manufactured from High-Resistance Plastic: Provide greater robustness and durability, ensuring the equipment withstands demanding working conditions without compromising its structural integrity.
pneumatica2g.texto2: Two Pneumatic Valve Actuation System: Offers precise and reliable flow control, enabling safe and efficient operation in industrial environments.
pneumatica2g.texto3: Enhanced Operator Safety: The operational flow is only activated when both triggers are pressed simultaneously, minimizing the risk of accidents and increasing operator safety.
pneumatica2g.texto4: Easy Maintenance: Optimized design to simplify maintenance processes, reducing downtime and operational costs throughout the equipment's service life.
pneumatica2g.texto5: WJTA Standard Orange Color: Facilitates visual identification of the equipment, meeting WJTA international safety standards and ensuring compliance in work environments.
pneumatica2g.texto6: Maximum Working Pressure up to 2,800 bar: Suitable for operations requiring ultra-high pressure, delivering exceptional performance in critical tasks.
pneumatica2g.texto7: Compatible with the MAMUTH 40K Power Box: Must be used in conjunction with the MAMUTH 40K Power Box to ensure maximum performance and safety in high-pressure applications.
pneumatica2g.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

fluxofechado.texto1: Handle Manufactured from High-Resistance Plastic: Developed to withstand extreme conditions, providing durability and a long service life for the equipment.
fluxofechado.texto2: Closed-Flow System Actuated by a Mechanical Valve: Ensures greater control and precision during operation, reducing the risk of leaks and increasing safety.
fluxofechado.texto3: Greater Operational Comfort: Ergonomically designed to reduce operator fatigue, allowing prolonged use without compromising performance.
fluxofechado.texto4: WJTA Standard Green Color: Quick visual identification in compliance with WJTA international safety standards.

fluxoaberto.texto2: ON/OFF Valve Actuation: Facilitates precise control of the system, offering convenience in use and safety during operations.
fluxoaberto.texto3: Easy Maintenance: Designed to simplify maintenance processes, ensuring less downtime and greater equipment durability.
fluxoaberto.texto4: Maximum Working Pressure (1,400 bar): High pressure capacity, ideal for jobs that require high performance and reliability.
fluxoaberto.texto5: Maximum Working Pressure up to 1,200 bar: Ideal for applications requiring high pressure, ensuring efficiency and effectiveness in demanding operations.

tubeclean.title: Tubeclean Mamuth
tubeclean.texto1: A tool engineered to assist operators in the efficient cleaning of evaporators and various pipelines, particularly in vertical positions. Ideal for removing residues and obstructions, ensuring proper maintenance and continuous system operation. It provides greater safety and precision during the cleaning process, reducing physical effort and the time required to complete the task.
tubeclean.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

powerbox.title: Power Box MAMUTH 2,800
powerbox.texto1: The Power Box MAMUTH 2,800 Bar is an accessory that must be used in conjunction with the MTP 2,800 Bar Dual Trigger Spray Gun or the Viper 40K Rotary Spray Gun. Actuation occurs when both gun triggers are pressed simultaneously, releasing the water flow through redirection by the dump valve. When the triggers are released, the valve closes and the flow is directed to the surge suppressor, draining the water at low pressure.
powerbox.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

pedalaberto.title: MTPA 1,400 Bar Open-Flow Foot Pedal
pedalaberto.texto1: The MTPA 1,400 Bar Open-Flow Foot Pedal is designed for tasks where the hydroblasting operator needs to use both hands, making it ideal for cleaning heat exchangers or pipelines in general. This accessory provides greater safety and comfort, as the operator has total control over releasing the water flow with their foot. The open-flow system simplifies its utilization and brings enhanced safety to both the high-pressure system and the operator.
pedalaberto.texto2: Internal Surge Suppressor: An internal damper reduces the flow activation impact.
pedalaberto.texto3: Cartridge-Type Valve: Can be easily replaced in the field.
pedalaberto.texto4: Maximum Operational Safety: Maximizes safety in hydroblasting operations since the operator has complete control over activating the high-pressure water flow.
pedalaberto.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

malhaseguranca.title: Hose Safety Whipcheck
malhaseguranca.texto1: A safety device used at hose and pipe connections designed to prevent sudden movement or whipping in the event of a connection failure.

lancatubo.title: Stainless Steel Lance and Tube
lancatubo.texto1: Known as rods or lances, these are used as flow conductors or as extensions for nozzles and hoses. They can be manufactured in any custom length.
lancatubo.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

lacoseguranca.title: Hose Safety Cable Loop
lacoseguranca.texto1: A safety device used at hose and pipe connections designed to prevent sudden movement or whipping in the event of a connection failure.
lacoseguranca.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

distorcedor.title: MT2800 UHP Hose Swivel Joint
distorcedor.texto1: The Swivel Joint is a safety component that, when used with the hose, eliminates torsional stress on the fitting, thereby preventing premature failure and subsequent accidents.
distorcedor.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

cabecote.title: NLB Torrent 3D Rotary Tank Cleaning Head
cabecote.texto1: The NLB Torrent 3D Head is an advanced tool specifically designed for efficient tank cleaning. This device not only drastically reduces cleaning time but also provides total operational safety by eliminating the need for an operator inside confined spaces, which is essential to minimize risks.
cabecote.texto2: The Torrent operates with precise movements along the vertical and horizontal axes, featuring a full 360° rotation to ensure comprehensive cleaning in all directions, reaching even the most difficult areas. With this accessory, cleaning time can be reduced by up to 80%, increasing productivity and efficiency in the process. It is ideal for industrial applications that require high performance and safety.
cabecote.textoCard: See more technical information about this product:

bicojato.title: 500-Bar Abrasive Waterjet Nozzle
bicojato.texto1: High-performance abrasive blasting nozzle designed for water-sandblasting operations at pressures up to 500 bar. Ideal for heavy-duty surface preparation, paint stripping, rust removal, and concrete decontamination.

valvulareguladora550.title: 550-Bar Pressure Regulating Valve
valvulareguladora550.texto1: High-precision pressure regulating and unloader valve designed to maintain stable system pressure and bypass excess flow in high-pressure waterjetting and washing systems operating up to 550 bar.
